title: KnightCrawler Gating Fix for Stremio Streams
wikilinks: Copilot Session Checkpoint: KnightCrawler Gating Fix, Opencode Bash Config
summary: This concept covers the root cause and resolution of 404 errors encountered in KnightCrawler streams on Stremio when domain gating is enabled via Caddy's handle_path directive. The fix involves injecting an access token prefix into URLs ...
